backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, defining all core data types (Vehicle, BlogPost, Promotion, Testimonial, etc.) and mixing in storage, authorization, and access control modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three authentication token features (store, attach, and remove from localStorage) to their implementing source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every component, page, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS entry file for the frontend application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that configures TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and protects admin routes with AuthGuard.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog form component for creating and editing admin users, using the caller's principal automatically on creation and dispatching create/update mutations with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Renders a table of admin users with edit and delete action buttons, showing loading skeletons and disabling delete when only one admin remains.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: A dialog component that displays a grid of uploaded image assets as a radio group, allowing the user to select one for use as a main or CTA banner.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: A dialog form for creating or editing blog posts with title, excerpt, and content fields, including delegation identity token validation before submission.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Displays a table of blog posts with publish/unpublish toggle switches and edit/delete actions, including a confirmation dialog for deletion.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Displays uploaded media assets in a grid with blob URL previews for images, and provides copy-ID and delete actions with identity/actor validation before deletion.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: A drag-and-drop file upload zone supporting images and PDFs up to 10MB, with per-file progress tracking and identity/actor validation before uploading to the canister.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: A dialog form component for creating or editing a passenger vehicle, with fields for name, description, and base price, using create/update vehicle mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all passenger vehicles with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status, including a confirmation dialog for deletion.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: A dialog form for creating or editing a promotion, with fields for title, description, start date, and end date, using create/update promotion mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all promotions with their period and active status, supporting edit, delete, and active status toggle actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: A dialog form for creating or editing a testimonial, with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1–5), using create/update testimonial mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all testimonials showing customer name, content, and star rating, with edit and delete action buttons delegated via props.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Renders a horizontal bar chart showing the top 10 most visited pages, with loading skeleton and empty state handling. URL paths are truncated for display while full URLs appear in tooltips.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart displaying visitor trends over the last 30 days, converting bigint timestamps to formatted Indonesian dates. Includes loading skeleton and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that checks Internet Identity delegation validity, syncs or clears the auth token in localStorage, and redirects unauthenticated users to the login page.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a static list of 5 latest article links that navigate to individual blog post pages using TanStack Router. Each item is rendered as a clickable button with a file icon.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom action bar with four buttons: Call, WhatsApp, credit simulation link, and a navigation menu toggle. The menu dropdown lists site navigation links and closes on outside click.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Renders a set of toggle buttons for selecting a vehicle variant, defaulting to the first variant and notifying the parent via a callback on selection change.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a full-width CTA banner image fetched from website settings/media assets, with a dark overlay and a WhatsApp contact button. Falls back to a static image if no asset is configured.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer displaying dealer logo, contact info, social media links, and live visitor statistics fetched and auto-refreshed every 15 seconds. Includes operating hours and copyright info.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Renders a page-specific hero banner with a title, icon, background color, and subtitle determined by the current pathname. Mobil Niaga pages use black text instead of white.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Fetches and displays up to 8 family vehicle catalog entries in a carousel using VehicleCard components. Shows a loading message while data is being fetched.
Displays a carousel of up to 8 commercial vehicles (Mobil Niaga) fetched from the vehicle catalog API, with a loading state fallback.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the main hero banner image fetched from website settings/media assets, falling back to a static placeholder, with an overlay title for Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop links, and a mobile hamburger menu that closes on outside click, linking to all public pages.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Renders like and share buttons for a vehicle product, tracking counts via the useProductInteractions hook and optionally triggering the native Web Share API.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of up to 4 featured vehicles from the catalog using VehicleCard components, with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: A search input section that redirects users to the mobil-keluarga page with a query parameter when they submit a search.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section displaying three dealership selling points (flexible installments, low down payment, negotiable price) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section with two paragraphs describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang as an authorized dealer.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector component allowing users to choose a vehicle variant and color, notifying the parent via a callback whenever the selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying a vehicle's placeholder image, name, formatted base price in IDR, and a link to its detail page using a slug derived from the vehicle name.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian-language string constants for UI labels, validation messages, and success/error/confirmation messages used across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: React Query hook that fetches admin dashboard statistics; currently returns hardcoded zeros as the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: React Query hooks for CRUD operations on admin users; get and create are implemented against the backend, while update and delete throw not-implemented errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on blog posts (get all, get by ID, create, update, delete, toggle publish status), all stubbed with unimplemented backend calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on commercial vehicle categories, all stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a contact form, currently stubbed with a console log and no backend call, plus backward-compatibility aliases.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all contact submissions and deleting a contact, both stubbed pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a credit simulation form, currently stubbed with a console log, plus backward-compatibility aliases.
Provides React Query hooks for fetching all credit simulations and deleting one, both stubbed pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity state, and status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, uploading, and deleting media assets, with actual backend actor calls implemented for all three operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for getting and mutating product like/share counts, all stubbed since backend methods are missing, plus a combined convenience hook.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on promotions (get all, create, update, delete, toggle active status), all stubbed with unimplemented backend calls.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching vehicle catalogs and a single vehicle with catalog data, both stubbed returning empty/null since backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a React Query hook for fetching website settings, currently stubbed to return null.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on testimonials, but all mutation and query functions are stubbed with errors since the backend endpoints are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on vehicles including catalog retrieval and publish toggling, but all backend calls are stubbed and not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching visitor statistics; getVisitorStats calls the real backend, while getVisitorTrend and getPageViews are disabled stubs pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that is now a no-op, with tracking responsibility moved to PublicLayout.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and update website settings via the backend actor, with mutations protected by principal-based auth.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin shell layout with a collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile handling, click-outside collapse, and a logout handler that clears the query cache and identity.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing page shell that wraps content with Navbar, optional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar, and handles visitor tracking on each route change via the backend actor.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
Admin page for managing admin users, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via AdminUserList and AdminUserDialog components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Admin page for managing blog posts with add/edit functionality via BlogPostList and BlogPostDialog, invalidating the blogPosts query cache on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder admin page for commercial vehicles (Mobil Niaga) that displays a notice redirecting users to the passenger vehicles section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Admin page that fetches and displays all credit simulation submissions in a sortable table with vehicle ID, amount, term, and date columns.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard page displaying summary stat cards (vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, visitors) fetched via useAdminStats.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Admin page that fetches and displays all contact form submissions sorted by timestamp in a table with name, email, message, and date columns.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Admin media manager page combining a file upload zone and a media asset grid, invalidating the mediaAssets cache after successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles (Mobil Keluarga) with add/edit support via PassengerVehicleList and PassengerVehicleDialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with add/edit functionality via PromoList and PromoDialog components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add, edit, and delete (with confirmation dialog) functionality using TestimonialList and TestimonialDialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin page displaying real-time visitor statistics (auto-refreshing every 15 seconds) including stat cards, a trend chart, and a top pages chart.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for managing website settings including site name, contact info, social media URLs, and banner images, with form state synced from fetched settings and identity validation on submit.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates admins via Internet Identity, syncs the auth token on success, and redirects to the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage that composes multiple section components such as banners, vehicle highlights, CTA, about us, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for a blog article detail view, displaying an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for the blog list view, displaying an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form for visitor inquiries (name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, DP, tenor, message) that submits via the useContactForm hook with toast feedback.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Detail page for a family vehicle, showing image, price, variant/color selector, action buttons, and tabs for specifications and features based on a slug-matched catalog entry.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public listing page for family vehicles that fetches all vehicle catalogs and renders up to 8 as VehicleCard components in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Public listing page for commercial vehicles filtered by category slug, rendering up to 8 VehicleCard components in a grid with the category name as a heading.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Detail page for a commercial vehicle, showing image, price, variant selector, action buttons, and tabs for specifications and features based on a slug-matched catalog entry.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Public page displaying three hardcoded commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to the respective category listing page.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page for promotions, displaying an 'under development' message with a suggestion to contact sales.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Public page that renders a credit simulation form, allowing users to select a vehicle, enter down payment and tenor, and submit a credit simulation request with a live installment estimate.
Placeholder public page for testimonials that displays a 'under development' message.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines frontend-local TypeScript interfaces (Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleCatalog, Promotion, BlogPost, etc.) that mirror backend canister types for use throughout the frontend.
frontend/src/utils/apiClient.ts: Provides a `protectedCall` wrapper for ICP canister calls that validates the user's authenticated principal, checks session activity, and handles authorization errors with appropriate error types.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions for converting canister-stored Uint8Array blob data into browser-displayable object URLs and checking MIME types for images and PDFs.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Exports a single `calculateInstallment` function that computes monthly loan installments using an 8% annual interest rate given vehicle price, down payment, and tenor.
frontend/src/utils/tokenStorage.ts: Manages persistence of the authenticated Internet Identity principal ID and session metadata in localStorage, including save, retrieve, expiry check, and clear operations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Collection of form validation helpers (required, email, phone, length, numeric, URL) plus a `validateDelegationIdentity` function that checks ICP delegation identity validity and expiration.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Provides utility functions for visitor tracking including session ID generation/persistence in localStorage, device type detection, browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 5) for a Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang admin system, documenting architectural notes, known issues, existing features, and pending action requests related to authentication, stable storage, and admin CRUD persistence.
